the game is good if it gives you free long arms but someone asked if i could freestyle and i asked if there was any voice warnings and any rules and stuff like that and he said no but i guess there was a mod in my server because the instant i was done with my freestyle some guy reported me and i instantly got banned. mind you i literally asked if i could get banned and nobody said yes

At First It Was Fun But Then I Switched To Gorilla Tag Again Because Long Arms Kept Getting In The Way And Shiny Rocks Felt Useless But Now All My Brother And Cousins Play Is This When Gorilla Tag Is Better And I Warned Them Soon There’s A Chance This Will Get Deleted By Gorilla Tag Because It’s A Plain Copy With Long Arms And Inf Shiny Rocks Plus Gorilla Tag Updates In 2 Days (Time I’m Making Review) And Once This Sees The Update It Will Take Months To Remake Plus This Becomes Boring After A Day And I’m Really Excited For Prop Haunt Because You Actually Need Short Arms For That So In Conclusion Don’t Get This It’s A Copy Of Gorilla Tag,It’s Will Get Boring And If You Do Get Bored But Not Your Siblings Or Friends Your By Yourself ￼So Just To Let You Know I Warned You

I have been playing quite a bit and also have been in the discord and I love the community! There is always active moderators, admins, etc: this makes it easy to find them. I have made a lot of friends inside of this community including some staff members, and I can say, they are extremely helpful.

I'm a boy who doesn't like having short arms and horror updates so I saw "memory tag" on yt by shadowvr and I downloaded it and it's the non-horror version and you get longarms that actually fit the controller and also to top it up they update the shop every time new cosmetics come out love it my sister also loves it 

19/10 game❥
